# chan-ok.com

> 프론트엔드 개발, 기술, 경험을 기록하는 개인 블로그입니다.
> A personal blog sharing frontend development, technology, and experiences.

## Site Info

- URL: https://chan-ok.com
- Author: Chanho Kim
- Languages: Korean, English, Japanese
- Topics: Frontend Development, React, TypeScript, Web Performance, Career
- Total Posts: 1

## Navigation

- [Korean Blog](https://chan-ok.com/ko): 한국어 포스트
- [English Blog](https://chan-ok.com/en): English posts
- [Japanese Blog](https://chan-ok.com/ja): 日本語のポスト
- [About](https://chan-ok.com/ko/about): 저자 소개 / About the author
- [Contact](https://chan-ok.com/ko/contact): 연락처 / Contact
- [RSS Feed](https://chan-ok.com/api/rss?locale=ko): RSS 피드 (한국어)
- [Sitemap](https://chan-ok.com/sitemap.xml): 전체 사이트맵

## Content Policy

All content is original writing by the author.
Posts are written in Korean, English, or Japanese.
Code examples are provided for educational purposes.

## 한국어 (Korean) Posts
